tickets.title: US001: Student account verification
tickets.description:
As a student, I want to create an account using my .edu email address so that only verified students can access the marketplace.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. The system accepts registration using a valid .edu email address.
2. The system rejects registration using a non-.edu email address.
3. The user can access the marketplace after email verification.

tickets.title: US002: Safe exchange zone selection
tickets.description:
As a student, I want to select a safe exchange zone before chatting with a seller so that item exchanges are safer.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. The system displays a list of approved safe exchange zones.
2. The user must select a safe exchange zone before starting a chat.
3. The selected safe exchange zone is visible in the chat.
